src: VINCE is the Vulnerability Information and Coordination Environment developed and used by the CERT Coordination Center to improve coordinated vulnerability disclosure. VINCE is a Python-based web platform.
ja: VINCEはCERT Coordination Centerが開発・使用する脆弱性情報・調整環境で、協調的な脆弱性開示の改善を目的としたPythonベースのWebプラットフォーム。
